title: How to Reserve a Spot for an Event
content: If a user asks how to reserve an event: Guide them to the CultPass app. Instruct them to browse the experience catalog and tap Reserve. If it is a premium or limited event, check if reservation confirmation is required via email. Remind them to arrive at least 15 minutes early with their QR code visible. Suggested phrasing: You can reserve an experience by opening the CultPass app, selecting your desired event, and tapping Reserve. Be sure to arrive 15 minutes early with your QR code ready.

title: Whats Included in a CultPass Subscription
content: Each user is entitled to 4 cultural experiences per month, which may include: Art exhibitions, Museum entries, Music concerts, Film screenings and more. Some premium experiences may require an additional fee (visible in the app). Suggested phrasing: Your CultPass subscription includes 4 curated experiences each month. You can choose from museums, concerts, film events and more. Premium events may have an extra cost, which is shown during reservation.

title: How to Cancel or Pause a Subscription
content: Users can manage their subscription via the app My Account then Manage Plan. Cancel: Effective at the end of the billing cycle. Pause: Preserves user data, resumes automatically when reactivated. Do NOT offer refunds unless approved by support lead. Suggested phrasing: You can cancel or pause your subscription at any time via the My Account section in the CultPass app. Cancelation takes effect at the end of your billing cycle.

title: How to Handle Login Issues
content: Most login issues are resolved with password reset: Ask the user to tap Forgot Password on the login screen. Ensure they are using the correct registered email. If they did not receive the reset email, check spam folder or retry after 10 minutes. For persistent login issues, escalate to human support. Suggested phrasing: Try tapping Forgot Password on the login screen. Make sure you are using the email associated with your account. If the email does not arrive, check spam or try again in a few minutes.

title: How to Request a Refund
content: Refund requests must follow these guidelines: Refunds are only available within 7 days of purchase. User must not have used any experiences in the current billing cycle. Partial refunds are not available. Process: User submits request via app Help then Request Refund. Refund processing takes 5-10 business days. Suggested phrasing: To request a refund, go to Help then Request Refund in the app. Please note refunds are only available within 7 days of purchase if no experiences have been used. Processing takes 5-10 business days.

title: How to Update Payment Method
content: Users can update their payment method through the app: Go to My Account then Payment Methods. Tap Add New Card or Edit on existing card. Enter new card details and save. The new card will be used for the next billing cycle. Suggested phrasing: You can update your payment method by going to My Account then Payment Methods in the CultPass app. Add a new card or edit your existing payment details there.

title: How to Change Email Address
content: To change the email address associated with a CultPass account: Go to My Account then Profile Settings. Tap on email address field. Enter new email and confirm with password. A verification email will be sent to the new address. Click the verification link within 24 hours. Suggested phrasing: To change your email, go to My Account then Profile Settings, enter your new email address, and confirm with your password. You will receive a verification email at your new address.

title: How to Upgrade to Premium Tier
content: Premium tier benefits include: Access to exclusive premium experiences. 8 experiences per month instead of 4. Priority booking for popular events. No additional fees on premium events. To upgrade: Go to My Account then Manage Plan then Upgrade to Premium. Price difference is prorated for current billing cycle. Suggested phrasing: You can upgrade to Premium by going to My Account then Manage Plan then Upgrade to Premium. Premium includes 8 experiences per month and access to exclusive events.

title: How to Cancel a Reservation
content: Reservations can be cancelled up to 24 hours before the event: Go to My Reservations in the app. Select the reservation to cancel. Tap Cancel Reservation. The experience credit will be restored to your monthly quota. Note: Cancellations within 24 hours of the event are not refundable to the monthly quota. Suggested phrasing: You can cancel a reservation up to 24 hours before the event by going to My Reservations and tapping Cancel Reservation. Your experience credit will be restored to your monthly quota.

title: App Not Loading or Crashing
content: If the CultPass app is not loading or crashing: 1. Force close the app and reopen it. 2. Check internet connection (WiFi or mobile data). 3. Update to the latest app version from App Store or Play Store. 4. Clear app cache: Settings then Apps then CultPass then Clear Cache. 5. Restart the device. 6. If issue persists, uninstall and reinstall the app. Suggested phrasing: Please try force closing and reopening the app. Make sure you have a stable internet connection and the latest app version. If the issue continues, try clearing the app cache or reinstalling.

title: QR Code Not Displaying
content: If the QR code for an event is not displaying: Ensure you have a confirmed reservation. Check that you are logged into the correct account. QR codes appear 2 hours before the event start time. Try refreshing the reservation screen. Check internet connectivity. If issues persist, show reservation confirmation email at venue. Suggested phrasing: QR codes appear 2 hours before your event. Please refresh the reservation screen and ensure you have internet connectivity. As a backup, you can show your confirmation email at the venue.
tags: QR code, technical, reservation, event, access

title: How to Contact Customer Support
content: Users can contact CultPass customer support through multiple channels: In-app chat: Help then Chat with Support (fastest response). Email: support@cultpass.com (response within 24 hours). Phone: 1-800-CULTPASS (Mon-Fri 9AM-6PM). Social media: @CultPassHelp on Twitter. Suggested phrasing: You can reach our support team through the in-app chat for the fastest response, or email us at support@cultpass.com. We are also available by phone at 1-800-CULTPASS during business hours.

title: Account Blocked or Suspended
content: If a users account is blocked or suspended: Check for policy violations (no-shows, fraudulent activity). Verify payment status - failed payments can cause suspension. Review if there are outstanding disputes. For legitimate blocks, escalate to support lead. Temporary blocks are lifted after 30 days with good standing. Suggested phrasing: Your account may be suspended due to payment issues or policy violations. Please check your payment method is up to date. For further assistance, our support team will review your account status.

title: How to View Past Experiences
content: Users can view their experience history: Go to My Account then Experience History. Filter by date range, category, or venue. Each entry shows date, venue, and experience details. Users can rate and review past experiences. History is available for the past 2 years. Suggested phrasing: You can view all your past experiences by going to My Account then Experience History. There you can filter by date or category and leave reviews for venues you have visited.

title: Family or Group Subscriptions
content: CultPass offers family and group subscription options: Family Plan: Up to 4 members, shared quota of 12 experiences per month. Group Plan: 5-10 members for corporate or organization use. Each member gets their own login and QR codes. One billing account manages payments for all members. To add family members: My Account then Family Plan then Add Member. Suggested phrasing: Our Family Plan allows up to 4 members with a shared quota of 12 experiences per month. You can add family members through My Account then Family Plan then Add Member.
